tx.retrying_collision: A targeted UTxO was just consumed. Retrying with a fresh pick (attempt {{attempt}})…
tx.busy_detail: The protocol is currently busy: every targeted UTxO was consumed by another transaction. Wait a few seconds and submit again.

errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.blockfrost_auth: Blockfrost rejected the request. Your VITE_BLOCKFROST_PROJECT_ID looks invalid for this network.
errors.blockfrost_rate: Blockfrost rate-limited the request. Wait a few seconds and try again.
errors.blockfrost_other: Blockfrost is having a moment. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.cbor: Transaction encoding failed. This is a bug, please report it.
errors.script_eval: On-chain script rejected the transaction. The pool or fee shard may have changed since you loaded the page. Refresh and retry.
errors.no_utxos: Your wallet has no spendable UTxOs for this transaction.
errors.no_fee_shards: Every fee shard is currently being spent. Wait a few seconds for them to settle and try again.
errors.collateral_unreachable: Collateral provider unreachable. Wait for it to recover and try again.

error.boundary_lede: An unexpected error broke this screen. The protocol is unaffected. Your boxes are still on chain. Reload to recover. If the same error keeps showing up, clear local state and try again.

app.title: Lovejoin
app.preprod_banner: Preprod only · do not use real funds

home.lede: A Cardano-native privacy mixer with fixed-denomination boxes and N-way sigma-OR re-randomization.
home.pillar_one_copy: Lock the fixed denomination into a fresh mix-box.
home.pillar_two_copy: Re-randomise N boxes in a single tx.
home.pillar_three_copy: Spend a Schnorr proof to a stealth address.

config.advanced_lede: These overrides only apply on this browser, only while ?advanced=1 is in the URL. Production users never see this panel.
config.blockfrost_help: Free key at blockfrost.io. Required for chain queries + tx submission.
config.backend_url_help: Self-hosted indexer URL. Leave empty to query Blockfrost directly.
config.collateral_endpoint_help: Defaults to giveme.my. Override only if running your own provider.
config.missing_addresses: addresses.{{network}}.json missing in ui/public/. Copy from artifacts/{{network}}/.

wallet.modal_lede: Your wallet does three things by default: one signature to derive your vault, plus a signature for each deposit and each withdraw. Mix txs are wallet-anonymous in shard mode (the default), so your wallet stays off the tx entirely.
wallet.no_wallets: Install Lace, Eternl, Nami, or Flint, then reload this page.
wallet.network_mismatch: Wallet is on {{walletNet}} but this app is configured for {{appNet}}. Switch your wallet's network or pick a different account.
wallet.insufficient_balance: Wallet balance is {{have}} ₳. This transaction needs at least {{need}} ₳ for fees. The build will likely fail.
wallet.disconnect_lede: The session vault will lock and the next reconnect will re-prompt for a signature. Boxes are unaffected. They live on chain.

pool.lede: Anyone can mix the pool; there's no operator. Each Mix tx re-randomises N pool boxes in one go, and you can pay for it two ways. Pay from the shared fee shard and your wallet stays off the tx entirely (wallet-anonymous). Or pay from your wallet and the tx is faster, but it carries your wallet identity.
pool.width_help: Linkage probability per round: 1/{{n}}. Larger N means a bigger tx + more verifier work, with empirical max set by the deployment ({{cap}}).
pool.width_help_fixed: Deployment is calibrated for N = {{n}}. Linkage probability is 1/{{n}} per round; submit again for compounding privacy.
pool.mix_disabled_collateral: Collateral provider unreachable. Mix is disabled.
pool.mix_disabled_pool: Pool too small ({{have}} of {{need}} boxes loaded).
pool.mix_disabled_wallet_needed: Wallet-fee mode requires a connected wallet. Connect a wallet, or switch to Fee shard.
pool.fee_payer_shard_hint: Default. The fee comes from the shared on-chain pool (capped at {{cap}} ADA per mix), and collateral comes from the configured collateral service. Your wallet stays off the tx entirely.
pool.fee_payer_wallet_hint: Your wallet pays the fee and supplies collateral. No on-chain cap, but your wallet identity is on the tx.
pool.tx_preview_fee_shard: Fee paid by the fee_contract shard. Collateral provided by the configured collateral service. Your wallet is not involved in this tx.
pool.tx_preview_fee_wallet: Fee paid by your wallet, and your wallet also supplies the collateral. Your wallet identity is on the tx.
pool.review_selection_value: {{n}} boxes selected at random from {{pool}} live
pool.review_fee_path_shard: Fee shard · your wallet is not on the tx
pool.review_fee_path_wallet: Your wallet · your wallet identity is on the tx
pool.review_collateral_value_shard: Provided by the configured collateral service
pool.empty_hint: No boxes have been deposited yet on this network. Make a deposit to seed the pool. Once at least 2 boxes are live, anyone can mix.
pool.confirm_lede_shard: Lovejoin will pick N random boxes, request collateral from the configured service, and submit the Mix tx. In shard mode you don't sign anything; the wallet stays off the tx.
pool.confirm_lede_wallet: Lovejoin will pick N random boxes and submit the Mix tx. Your wallet will pay the fee, supply the collateral, and sign.

deposit.lede: Lock the fixed denomination into a fresh mix-box. Your wallet derives a Lovejoin owner key on first unlock, so the same wallet recovers every deposit you make on any browser. No extra phrase to write down.
deposit.rounds_help: Higher rounds = more privacy. Funds the fee shard for future mixes.
deposit.count_help: Mint this many fresh mix-boxes in a single tx. Total locked: {{total}} ADA ({{denom}} per box).
deposit.preconditions_missing: Connect a wallet and unlock your vault to deposit.
deposit.see_vault: Box stored. See it in the Vault.
deposit.tx_preview_copy: Your wallet pays the {{denom}} ADA denomination plus a small replenish-fee top-up to the fee shard. Wallet signature is required.
deposit.tx_preview_copy_bulk: Your wallet pays {{total}} ADA ({{count}} × {{denom}} ADA) plus a replenish-fee top-up to the fee shard. One signature for the whole batch.
deposit.index_help: Vault counter for this deposit's owner secret.

donate.eyebrow: Top up the shared fee shards
donate.lede: Mix txs draw on a shared pool of fee shards. Donations top up that pool without minting a new mix-box. There is no privacy gain for you here (your wallet is on the tx), but every donation extends the runway for everyone else's mixes.
donate.shards_caption: Current per-shard balance of the shared fee pool.
donate.amount_help: Any positive amount is accepted on chain. The Replenish rule only requires the shard to gain lovelace.
donate.tx_preview_copy: Your wallet pays {{amount}} ADA into a randomly-picked fee shard. Wallet signature is required.

boxes.empty: Vault has no live owned boxes yet.
boxes.empty_hint: After a deposit confirms it appears here within a block.

mix.session_only_hint: Pick boxes from this session and mix them.
mix.need_more_boxes: Mix needs at least 2 deposited boxes. Run two deposits first.
mix.fee_payer_shard_hint: Pulls from the shared fee_contract pool. Subject to the on-chain max_fee_per_mix cap.
mix.fee_payer_wallet_hint: Submitter pays the fee directly. No on-chain cap, but the wallet identity is on the tx.

withdraw.lede: Pick a live owned box from your vault and withdraw it to a destination. The mix-box is spent by Schnorr proof, so the destination has no link back to the wallet that deposited.
withdraw.select_a_box: Select a deposited box from the list.
withdraw.select_boxes: Select one or more boxes to withdraw together.
withdraw.column_index_long: Vault index: derivation counter for this owner secret
withdraw.selection_summary: {{count}} box(es) selected. {{total}} ADA total to destination.
withdraw.no_box_selected: Select at least one vault box above to continue.
withdraw.confirm_lede: This will build and submit a withdraw tx. Verify the destination address. Once submitted, the spend cannot be reversed.
withdraw.seedelf_detected: Stealth address detected. Wallet identity will be hidden after withdraw.
withdraw.seedelf_hint: This is a key address. Your wallet identity is visible at the destination. Use a Seedelf address for stealth.
withdraw.preconditions_missing: Connect a wallet and unlock your vault to withdraw.
withdraw.tx_preview_copy: Your wallet signs to fund the tx fee and collateral. The mix-box is spent by Schnorr proof, not a wallet signature. The destination is the only address visible at the receiving end.
withdraw.review_kind_stealth: Stealth (script). Wallet identity hidden at destination.
withdraw.review_kind_regular: Regular key. Wallet identity visible at destination.
withdraw.dest_wrong_network: This is a {{addressNet}} address. Current network is {{expected}}.
withdraw.dest_regular_key: Regular key address. Your wallet identity is visible at the destination. Use a Seedelf address for stealth.
withdraw.dest_stealth: Stealth (script) address. Wallet identity is hidden after withdraw.
withdraw.empty_hint: Make a deposit and wait for it to confirm. The box will appear here within a block.

collateral_provider.banner_down: The collateral provider is unreachable. Mix submission is disabled until it recovers.

provider.tooltip_synced: Self-hosted indexer is caught up to chain tip. Pool data comes from your own stack.
provider.tooltip_syncing: Self-hosted indexer is reachable but lagging chain tip. Falling back to Blockfrost until caught up.
provider.tooltip_down: Self-hosted indexer is configured but unreachable. Falling back to Blockfrost.
provider.tooltip_blockfrost: No backend URL configured. All chain queries go through Blockfrost.

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.lede: A five-minute walkthrough of how Lovejoin actually works. The math blocks are there if you want them, but the prose alone is enough to follow the shape. The full security argument lives in the Sigmajoin paper.
protocol.primitives_p: Everything in Lovejoin is composed from these three pieces. Skim them once and the rest of this page reads cleanly.
protocol.primitive_g: g: the standard generator of BLS12-381's G1 group. It's a fixed point on the curve. The notation [k] · g means "add g to itself k times", which produces another point on the curve. Critically: given [k] · g, recovering k is the discrete-log problem, believed to be infeasible at this curve size. Every secret in Lovejoin hides behind this gap.
protocol.primitive_x: x: your owner secret. Just a random number, kept private. Lovejoin derives one per deposit deterministically from your wallet's signature, so you don't manage them by hand and the same wallet recovers them on any browser.
protocol.primitive_hash: blake2b-256: a hash function. We use it for the Fiat–Shamir transform, which collapses an interactive proof (prover and verifier exchanging messages) into a single piece of data the prover can post on chain. It shows up twice below: in the Mix proof and in the Withdraw proof.
protocol.deposit_p1: A deposit picks a fresh random number <c>d</c> and locks the fixed denomination at the mix-box script. The box carries an inline datum <c>(a, b)</c>, two 48-byte compressed curve points:
protocol.deposit_p2: Anyone watching the chain sees <c>(a, b)</c> but learns nothing about <c>x</c> or <c>d</c>: both are uniform random and the discrete log is hard. The point <c>b</c> is your <e>ownership mark</e>. Only the holder of <c>x</c> can later prove they're behind it, and that proof is what unlocks the box at withdraw time.
protocol.mix_p1: A Mix tx picks N live mix-boxes from the pool and re-randomises each one with a fresh scalar y_i. The outputs are permuted across the inputs by a random permutation π of 0..N:
protocol.mix_p2: The crucial property: if <c>b_i = [x_i] · a_i</c> on the input side, then <c>b'_i = [x_π(i)] · a'_i</c> on the output side. The same secret <c>x</c> still unlocks the box, even though the bytes <c>(a, b)</c> have changed completely. An outsider sees N inputs and N outputs but can't tell which input became which output.
protocol.mix_p3: Of course the tx has to prove the re-randomization is honest; otherwise a malicious submitter could write garbage outputs and steal everyone's funds. Each input gets an N-way sigma-OR proof: a non-interactive zero-knowledge proof that this input was re-randomized into one of the N outputs, without saying which. The witness for the true branch is the fresh scalar y_i; the other branches are simulated. With one such proof per input, every output is accounted for, and the ownership argument from above carries through the whole batch. Fiat–Shamir binds the proofs to the specific outputs in this tx, so they can't be lifted onto a different one.
protocol.privacy_p1: After a single Mix at width <c>N</c>, an outside observer's best guess at which output is yours is <c>1/N</c>. Mixes compose: <c>k</c> independent rounds drive the linkage probability down geometrically:
protocol.privacy_p2: Lovejoin's Preprod calibration today: N = 3 via the shared fee shard (the wallet-anonymous path), or N = 4 when the submitter pays the fee from their own wallet. The cap is a CPU-budget concern on the validator, not a security one. At N = 3, ten rounds drives linkage to about one in 60,000, and twenty rounds to about one in 3.5 billion. At N = 4, ten rounds gets you to about one in a million, and twenty rounds to about one in a trillion.
protocol.withdraw_p1: To leave the pool you spend the mix-box at its <c>mix_box</c> script's owner branch with a <e>Schnorr proof</e> that you know the <c>x</c> behind <c>b = [x] · a</c>. Schnorr is the simplest sigma protocol: the prover commits to a random point, the verifier challenges, the prover responds. Fiat–Shamir replaces the verifier's challenge with a hash, making the whole exchange a single piece of data:
protocol.withdraw_p2: The hash that produces <c>c</c> covers <c>tx.outputs</c>, which means the proof is bound to the exact destination addresses you signed for. Substituting outputs invalidates <c>c</c>, so a malicious submitter can't redirect your withdrawal anywhere you didn't ask. There is no wallet signature on the box itself; only the destination outputs are tx-authorised by the submitter's wallet (which pays the fee).
protocol.further_p: Full construction + security proofs are in the <paper>Sigmajoin paper</paper>. The on-chain verifier is in <c>contracts/validators/mix_logic.ak</c>; the off-chain builder is <c>offchain/src/tx/mix.ts</c>; cross-language test vectors are in <c>crypto/test-vectors/</c>.

vault.title: Vault
vault.lede: Sign a single message with your wallet. Lovejoin derives every owner secret deterministically from that signature. Recovery on a fresh browser is one click. No phrase to write down by default.
vault.locked_lede: Lovejoin derives your owner key from a wallet signature. The signature stays in this browser tab. It's never sent to a server, and locking the vault wipes it from memory. Only your wallet can produce this signature.
vault.scanning_pool: Scanning the pool for owned boxes…
vault.scan_summary: Found {{count}} owned box(es) in {{pool}} pool boxes.
vault.empty_hint: Make a deposit to populate the vault. The pool is rescanned each time the vault is unlocked.
vault.recover_lede: For wallets that don't expose signData, and as a cross-device recovery path. Your password and your wallet's stake address feed an Argon2id key derivation; nothing is written to disk. The same wallet + same password on any browser produces the same seed.
vault.recover_warning_title: Your password is the entire security barrier
vault.recover_warning_detail: Anyone who knows your wallet's public address can offline-brute-force this password. Use at least {{min}} characters from a mix of cases, digits, and symbols, or a 5+ word random passphrase. Lovejoin cannot recover a forgotten password.
vault.recover_password_hint: Minimum {{min}} characters. Stronger is better. Argon2id takes about 2 seconds either way.
vault.column_rounds_long: Mix rounds: how many times this box has been re-randomised since it was deposited.
vault.mix_row_confirm_lede: Submits a shard-fee mix tx that includes this box plus {{n}} - 1 other boxes picked at random from the live pool. Wallet stays off the tx; the fee is paid by a fee shard. The rounds counter for this box increases by one once the tx confirms.
vault.mix_disabled_collateral: Collateral provider is unreachable. Mix submission is disabled.
vault.mix_disabled_pool: Pool too small to mix this box. Need {{need}} live boxes; have {{have}}.

secret_card.title: Save this secret now
secret_card.warning: Without this secret no one, including you, can withdraw the box. The vault has stored an encrypted copy under your passphrase. Copy or download a backup as a second-line defence.
secret_card.label: Label

box.title: Box detail
box.linkage_explainer: Each Mix tx re-randomises the box; after k mixes at width N the linkage probability is (1/N)^k.
box.not_found: No box found at that ref. It may have been withdrawn, mixed away, or never imported.
box.preconditions_missing: Connect a wallet and unlock the vault to withdraw.
